## Docs

<!--
Per AGENTS.md's documentation update protocol, a change is not complete
until its docs are updated in the same PR. Check the ones that apply:
-->

- [ ] Updated the relevant page(s) under `docs/` (or N/A — no user-facing
      behavior changed)
- [ ] Added an ADR under `docs/decisions/` (or N/A — not a hard-to-reverse
      decision)
- [ ] Ran `go run . sync` and committed any regenerated files
- [ ] Ran `go run . check` — passing

## Testing

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
